title: Coord desired state
description: state/desired.json — the versioned declarative target that sessions reconcile toward at checkpoints. Created by `coord init` and bumped by `coord state set`.

version.description: Monotonic version, incremented on every `state set`. Messages tagged with an older as_of are stale.

updated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last update.

desired.description: Arbitrary key -> desired value map. Values are whatever `state set --value` parsed as (JSON when parseable, else the raw string).
